title: Elytra Hopper
description: Prevents landing with elytra while holding jump allowing you to hop around and save fireworks!
body:
Elytra Hopper is heavily inspired by [Elytra Recast](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-recast) but works in 26.1.1                
**If/When it updates you should use it instead!**



### Features
- After opening your elytra holding jump will keep it open after landing allowing you to hop around and gain some momentum.
- Landing in water closes your elytra allowing you to swim.
- Reduces jump cooldown to 1 tick allowing you to hold space to quickly use 2 block tall tunnels.
